তোমার স্বপ্নের
University আছে।
CGPA 2.8 তেও।

Low CGPA মানে game over না। MIT, UofT, TU Berlin — সব জায়গায় Bangladeshi students আছে যাদের CGPA তোমার চেয়ে কম ছিল। Research publication আর Professor cold-email — এই দুইটা জানলে তুমি set.

🎯 Smart Profile Matcher

তোমার Profile দাও — আমরা Match করবো

তোমার current academic state, interests, আর goals fill করো। আমরা instantly তোমার জন্য matched universities, scholarships, visa info, cost estimate, আর action plan একসাথে দেখাবো।

📋 তোমার Academic Profile
🌍 Destination & Goals
📝 Tests & Research
🎯 Personal Goals
🎓
তোমার Profile Fill করো
বামদিকের form পূরণ করে "Find My Universities" button চাপো। আমরা তোমার profile analyze করে matched universities, scholarships, visa requirements, cost estimate, আর personalized action plan একসাথে দেখাবো।
🧠 Mindset Reset

তোমার ৩টা Biggest Fear — এবং সেগুলোর Real Solution

প্রতিটা Bangladeshi student এই ৩টা fear নিয়ে আমাদের কাছে আসে। এবং প্রতিটারই একটা concrete solution আছে।

😰

"আমার CGPA মাত্র ২.৮ — আমাকে কেউ নেবে না"

99% Bangladeshi students মনে করে CGPA-ই সব। কিন্তু MIT-র PhD admission committee র প্রথম প্রশ্ন হলো: "এই student কি কোনো problem solve করতে পারে?"

✅ Solution: ResearchGate-এ একটা co-authored paper = MIT-র door খোলার চাবি। আমরা তোমাকে দেখাবো কিভাবে।
💸

"বিদেশে পড়া afford করতে পারব না"

Germany-তে public university tuition কার্যত free। Canada-তে CGPA 3.0+ হলে Graduate Assistantship-এ পুরো tuition আর stipend দেয়। USA-তে RA/TA position পেলে টাকা নয়, টাকা পাবে।

✅ Solution: আমাদের Scholarship Engine দেখো। Fully funded options আছে তোমার profile-এর জন্য।
🌍

"Embassy interview-এ reject হয়ে যাব"

Bangladesh থেকে visa rejection rate বেশি — কিন্তু সেটা preparation-এর অভাবে। Bank solvency, ties to home country, আর clear study plan — এই তিনটা থাকলে rejection rate নাটকীয়ভাবে কমে।

✅ Solution: আমাদের Embassy Masterclass section দেখো — country-specific tips সহ।
💰 Cost & Currency Engine

Real-Time Cost Calculator — BDT-তে

Country, program, আর lifestyle বেছে নাও। আমরা calculate করবো তোমার approximate annual cost — Bangladeshi Taka-তে। Bank solvency-র জন্য এই figure টা কাজে লাগবে।

Bank solvency-র জন্য এই total amount-এর 2x দেখাতে হবে আপনার account-এ।

Official website-এ যা লেখা নেই — সেই hidden GPA cutoffs, department-specific requirements, আর Bangladeshi student success rates।

Massachusetts Institute of Technology (MIT)

Fully Funded PhD RA/TA Available
🔍 Hidden Requirement: 95%+ PhD admits have 1+ peer-reviewed publication OR 2+ years research experience. CGPA 2.8 accepted with strong research profile from Bangladeshi applicants (verified cases: BUET 2022 cohort).

Knight-Hennessy (Full) NSF Fellowship

🔍 BD Tip: Australia Awards Scholarship — fully funded, open to BD citizens, covers tuition + living + flights. CGPA 3.0+ required. Apply by April/May each year via DFAT website.

🏆 Scholarship Database

Fully Funded vs Partial — Complete Breakdown

Scholarship Name Country Type Min CGPA Coverage BD Value (BDT) Deadline BD-Friendly?
Vanier Canada Graduate Scholarship
 🇨🇦 Canada ✅ FULLY FUNDED 3.5+ CAD 50K/yr stipend + tuition ৳41 Lac/yr Nov 1 ✅ Yes (BD citizens eligible)
DAAD Scholarship (Germany)
 🇩🇪 Germany ✅ FULLY FUNDED 2.8+ EUR 861/mo + tuition + flights ৳10.3 Lac/yr Oct 15 / Nov 15 ✅ Strong BD success rate
Rhodes Scholarship
 🇬🇧 UK (Oxford) ✅ FULLY FUNDED 3.7+ preferred GBP 18K/yr + all fees ৳25 Lac/yr Oct 1 ⚠️ Competitive (leadership focus)
Commonwealth Masters Scholarship
 🇬🇧 UK ✅ FULLY FUNDED 2:2 / 3.0+ Full tuition + GBP 1,347/mo stipend + flights ৳22 Lac/yr Dec 15 ✅ Excellent — BD quota exists
Erasmus Mundus Joint Masters
 🇪🇺 Europe (Multi) ✅ FULLY FUNDED 3.0+ EUR 1,400/mo + tuition + travel ৳16.8 Lac/yr Jan/Feb (varies) ✅ BD students regularly selected
NSF Graduate Research Fellowship (USA)
 🇺🇸 USA ✅ FULLY FUNDED US Citizen/PR only USD 37K/yr stipend + USD 16K tuition ৳58 Lac/yr Oct (varies by field) ❌ US Citizens/PR only
MIT Graduate Research Assistantship
 🇺🇸 USA ✅ FULLY FUNDED No fixed min (research fit) Full tuition + USD 2,500-3,500/mo stipend ৳44 Lac/yr equivalent Dec 15 ✅ Via professor contact
Clarendon Scholarship (Oxford)
 🇬🇧 UK ✅ FULLY FUNDED 3.7+ (First Class) Full tuition + GBP 1,500/mo ৳25 Lac/yr Jan (auto-considered) ⚠️ High competition (auto-applied)
Ontario Graduate Scholarship (OGS)
 🇨🇦 Canada (Ontario) 🔵 PARTIAL 3.2+ CAD 10,000-15,000/yr ৳8.2-12.3 Lac Varies by university ✅ BD students eligible
Deutschlandstipendium (Germany)
 🇩🇪 Germany 🔵 PARTIAL 2.7+ EUR 300/month (12 months) ৳3.6 Lac/yr Varies (university-specific) ✅ Supplement to free tuition
Birmingham International Award
 🇬🇧 UK 🔵 PARTIAL 2.8+ / 2:2 equiv GBP 2,000-5,000 tuition reduction ৳2.8-7 Lac Rolling (apply early) ✅ BD-accessible
ASU Global Launch Grant
 🇺🇸 USA 🔵 PARTIAL 2.75+ USD 3,000-6,000/yr reduction ৳3.3-6.6 Lac Rolling ✅ Accessible for low CGPA BD students
🔬 Research-First Strategy
Low CGPA? একটা Publication সব বদলে দিতে পারে।

CGPA 3.0-এর নিচে? Research দিয়ে Gap Cover করো

MIT-র admission committee কি বলে জানো? "We admit students, not transcripts." CGPA 2.8 দিয়ে MIT-তে গেছে BUET-এর students — কারণ তাদের ছিল IEEE paper আর strong research narrative। এটাই তোমার path।

// STEP 01

📝 Research Publication Strategy

3rd year-এই শুরু করো। Thesis supervisor-এর সাথে co-author করার সুযোগ খোঁজো।

  • Target Journals: IEEE Access (faster review), MDPI journals (open access)
  • Bangla twist: Bangladesh-specific problem solve করো — local data = niche paper
  • Conference first: ICCIT, ICECE (local) → arXiv preprint → IEEE conference
  • Timeline: 4th year শেষে minimum 1 submitted/accepted paper
  • Co-authorship: Even 2nd/3rd author counts significantly
// STEP 02

📧 Cold Email Professor Mastery

80% Bangladeshi students হয় email করে না, অথবা wrong email করে। এই template দিয়ে তোমার approach differentiate করো।

  • Research fit: Professor-এর last 2 papers পড়ে specific feedback দাও
  • Subject line: "Prospective PhD Student — [Specific Research Topic] Inquiry"
  • Body: 150 words max, 3 paragraphs: Who, Why them, What you offer
  • Follow up: 2 weeks পর একবার, তারপর ছেড়ে দাও
  • Volume: 30-50 professors email করো (tracking spreadsheet রাখো)
// STEP 03

💼 SOP — Your CGPA Reframe

Statement of Purpose হলো তোমার chance to control the narrative। CGPA-র কথা না তুললে committee-ই তুলবে — তাই তুমিই তোলো, সঠিকভাবে।

  • Acknowledge + Pivot: "My GPA of 2.9 reflects..." → pivot to project/research impact
  • Upward trend: 5th/6th semester better হলে explicitly mention করো
  • Industry/Project proof: GitHub repos, Kaggle scores, competition wins
  • Research interest specificity: Vague = rejected. "Machine Learning for Bengali NLP" = strong
  • Word count: 800-1000 words, no fluff
// STEP 04

📚 LOR Strategy — Choose Wisely

Letter of Recommendation ভুল মানুষের কাছে নিলে application destroy হতে পারে।

  • Priority 1: Professor যার under-এ research করেছো
  • Priority 2: Professor যার course-এ top 10% ছিলে
  • Priority 3: Industry supervisor (research-based job হলে)
  • Avoid: HoD/VC (generic letters = waste of slot)
  • Prep package দাও: Draft, your CV, SOP, research summary
// STEP 05

🏆 Portfolio Building

Admission committee এখন Google করে তোমাকে। তোমার digital footprint কী বলছে?

  • GitHub: Active repos with documentation
  • ResearchGate/Google Scholar: Profile with any papers
  • LinkedIn: Clean, research-focused profile
  • Personal website: Free GitHub Pages site (huge differentiator)
  • Kaggle/LeetCode: Top rankings screenshot করে SOP-এ mention করো
// STEP 06

🎯 University Selection Matrix

CGPA below 3.0 হলে university selection strategy হয় different।

  • Safety (60% chance): Mid-tier with faculty match — apply 4-5টা
  • Target (30% chance): Good tier with faculty match — apply 5-6টা
  • Reach (10% chance): Top tier with strong research — apply 2-3টা
  • Germany route: TUM/RWTH — GPA less relevant, research matters
  • Total: 15-20 applications (minimum for low CGPA)
📧

Proven Cold Email Template — Professor-এর Reply Rate 25%+ (Average BD student: 3%)

Subject: Prospective PhD Student (Fall 2026) — [Bengali NLP / Your Specific Topic] Research Inquiry
Dear Professor [Last Name],
I am writing to express my interest in joining your research group as a PhD student in Fall 2026. I recently read your paper on "[Specific Paper Title from last 2 years]" and was particularly intrigued by [specific finding or methodology you can genuinely comment on — 1 sentence]. This directly connects to the work I am currently conducting on [your research area].
I am currently completing my B.Sc./M.Sc. in [Department] at [BUET/DU/KUET/etc.], Bangladesh, with a CGPA of [X.XX]. During my studies, I [co-authored/submitted a paper on / developed a system that / achieved X result in project Y]. I have attached my CV and a brief research proposal (2 pages) for your review.
Would you be open to a brief 15-minute video call to discuss potential research directions in your group? I understand your time is valuable and I am happy to accommodate your schedule.
Thank you for your consideration.
Warm regards,
[Your Name]
[University, Department] | [Phone] | [LinkedIn] | [GitHub/ResearchGate]
💡 Pro Tips: Email করো Tuesday-Thursday সকাল 9am professor-এর local time-এ। Gmail "Schedule Send" ব্যবহার করো। Subject line-এ university-র নাম mention করো না — professor বুঝবে আপনি bulk email করছেন।
Stop Scrolling. Start Flying. ✈️
PiLOT — Bangladesh's #1 Study Abroad Platform
📖 Test Preparation Hub

IELTS · GRE · GMAT · SAT · TOEFL — Complete Free Guide

পাঁচটি major test-এর জন্য complete roadmap, free resources, আর BD students-এর জন্য proven strategy — সব এক জায়গায়।

Target Score
7.0+
No band below 6.5
Prep Time
4–6 mo
Starting from scratch
Exam Fee (BD)
~৳22K
British Council / IDP Dhaka
Score Validity
2 Years
From exam date
Required For
USA/UK/CA/AU
All English-medium countries
Month 1–2 · Foundation

📚 Diagnostic + Basics

  • Cambridge IELTS 1–5 (Official) — Listening & Reading daily 45 min
  • Identify weak bands: Writing & Speaking typically hardest
  • Band descriptor chart — understand what band 6 vs 7 looks like
  • IELTS.org free sample tests — take 1 full mock
  • British Council free preparation materials (free on their site)
Month 3–4 · Core Skills

✍️ Writing + Speaking Focus

  • Writing Task 1: Charts/maps/processes — template + practice daily
  • Writing Task 2: 4-paragraph structure — 250+ words strictly
  • IELTS Liz (YouTube, free) — best Writing Task 2 guide for BD students
  • Speaking: Record yourself daily, upload to YouTube (private), analyze
  • Find IELTS speaking partner in FB groups: "IELTS Bangladesh"
  • Cambridge IELTS 6–10 — timed full tests weekly
Month 5–6 · Final Sprint

🎯 Mock Tests + Exam

  • Cambridge IELTS 14–18 (most recent, most accurate)
  • Full 4-section timed tests every weekend
  • IELTS.org Official Practice Test (free sample on website)
  • British Council mock test — book 2 weeks before real exam
  • Register: British Council Dhaka (+88 02 9897992) or IDP Bangladesh
  • Retake strategy: If 6.5 → retake in 6 weeks targeting 7.0+

🆓 Free Resources — Zero Cost Prep

Official Practice
IELTS.org Free Materials
Official sample papers, Listening tracks, Reading texts. Always accurate to real exam format.
FREEVisit ↗
YouTube (Best)
IELTS Liz
Best free Writing Task 2 lessons. Vocabulary lists, linking words, band 9 samples — all free.
FREEWatch ↗
YouTube
E2 IELTS
Speaking & Writing lessons by native English teachers. Daily practice videos, mock tests.
FREEWatch ↗
Practice App
British Council LearnEnglish
Grammar, vocabulary, all 4 skills. Free app + website. Good for daily habit building.
FREEVisit ↗
Mock Tests
IELTS Practice Online
Full mock tests with instant scoring. Track progress over time.
FREEVisit ↗
Paid (Worth It)
Cambridge IELTS Books 14–18
Official Cambridge practice tests. ~৳800/book at Nilkhet. Most accurate exam simulation.
~৳800/book

💡 BD-Specific IELTS Tips

  • Register 6–8 weeks early — British Council Dhaka slots fill fast especially July–December
  • UKVI IELTS (UK-specific): If applying to UK, must be UKVI version — same prep, different booking
  • Academic vs General: Study abroad = Academic IELTS. Migration = General Training
  • Speaking test is face-to-face with a human examiner — practice speaking aloud every day
  • Writing Task 2: Never write less than 260 words. Always have intro + 2 body paragraphs + conclusion
Target Score
100+
iBT (out of 120)
Prep Time
3–5 mo
Average for BD students
Exam Fee
~৳18K
USD 160–185 via ETS
Score Validity
2 Years
iBT scores
Required For
USA Mainly
Many US unis prefer TOEFL
Month 1 · Orientation

🗺️ Understand the Format

  • 4 sections: Reading (54–72 min), Listening (41–57 min), Speaking (17 min), Writing (50 min)
  • ETS TOEFL free sample test — take immediately to find baseline
  • Score goal: 90+ for most US unis, 100+ for top programs
  • TestDEN free practice tests — good for Reading & Listening
Month 2–3 · Skills Building

📚 All 4 Sections

  • Reading: Practice with academic articles — MIT OpenCourseWare texts
  • Listening: English podcasts + TED Talks + BBC World Service daily
  • Speaking: Integrated tasks need note-taking speed — practice daily 15 min
  • Writing: Integrated essay (3rd party perspective) + Independent (opinion)
  • Magoosh TOEFL (USD 99) — worth it for speaking practice with AI feedback
Month 4–5 · Test Ready

🎯 Mock Tests + Final

  • ETS TOEFL Official Practice Tests 1 & 2 (free download on ETS site)
  • 2 full timed mocks per week in final month
  • Speaking: Record every response, listen back critically
  • Register at ETS.org — select Bangladesh center (Dhaka usually IDP or British Council)

🆓 Free Resources

Official
ETS TOEFL Free Practice
Official free practice tests, sample questions for all 4 sections. Direct from exam makers.
FREEVisit ↗
YouTube
TST Prep TOEFL
Complete free TOEFL preparation channel with strategy lessons for all sections.
FREEWatch ↗
Practice
NoteFull TOEFL Mastery
Free Speaking & Writing lessons. Template-based approach — very effective for BD learners.
FREEVisit ↗
Reading Practice
TestDEN
Free TOEFL reading & listening practice with explanations.
FREEVisit ↗

💡 TOEFL vs IELTS — Which One?

  • TOEFL is preferred by most US universities; IELTS preferred by UK/Australia/Canada
  • If applying to both US and UK, IELTS gives more flexibility (accepted everywhere)
  • TOEFL Speaking is computer-recorded (easier for shy speakers than face-to-face IELTS)
  • TOEFL scores report faster — 6 days after exam vs 13 days for IELTS paper-based
Target Score
320+
V155+ Q167+ AWA 4.0
Prep Time
4–5 mo
Engineering background = faster
Exam Fee
~৳22K
USD 213 via ETS
Score Validity
5 Years
From exam date
Required For
USA/Canada
Many now optional but helps
Month 1 · Diagnostic

🔍 Baseline + Strategy

  • ETS PowerPrep Free Test 1 — take immediately, cold
  • Score breakdown: Q170 (perfect), V170 (perfect), AWA 6.0
  • BUET/Engineering background: Q165+ realistic without much effort
  • Focus: 70% Verbal (hardest for BD students), 30% Quant polish
  • Greg Mat YouTube — best free GRE channel, binge Week 1
Month 2–3 · Core Prep

📚 Verbal + Quant Mastery

  • Magoosh GRE Vocabulary (free app) — 1000 words, 20 words/day
  • Manhattan Prep 5lb Book (Quant) — buy at Nilkhet ~৳1200
  • Greg Mat free lessons (entire prep free on YouTube)
  • Text Completion & Sentence Equivalence — daily 30 practice questions
  • AWA: Issue + Argument essays — 1 per week, template-based approach
Month 4–5 · Mock Tests

🎯 Full Test Simulation

  • ETS PowerPrep Tests 1 & 2 (free) — most accurate simulation
  • ETS PP+ Tests 3–6 (USD 40 each) — take in final 3 weeks
  • Manhattan GRE Prep (6 tests) — worth buying if aiming 330+
  • Book exam at Prometric Dhaka — slots available year-round
  • BUET CS/EE alumni regularly score Q167+ with 4 months prep

🆓 Free Resources

Best Free (YouTube)
Greg Mat Plus
Complete free GRE prep — Verbal, Quant, AWA all covered. Best free resource globally. 500+ videos.

ETS PowerPrep Tests 1 & 2
Free official practice tests from exam makers. Most accurate simulation of real GRE.
FREEVisit ↗

1000 most important GRE words with flashcards and spaced repetition. Free app.
FREEVisit ↗
Quant Book
Manhattan 5lb Question Bank
Best Quant practice book. 1800+ questions. Buy at Nilkhet for ~৳1,200.
~৳1,200
Full Prep (Paid)
Magoosh GRE Premium
Best paid option. 200+ video lessons, 1000+ practice questions, score predictor. USD 149.
USD 149Visit ↗
Question Bank
GRE Prep Club
Huge free question bank, forum for explanations, and verbal practice sets.
FREEVisit ↗

💡 GRE Tips for BD Students

  • Most 2024–25 US programs made GRE optional — check each program before deciding
  • Submitting 320+ GRE can help overcome low CGPA — worth doing if aiming top schools
  • Quant 167+ is very achievable for BUET/engineering backgrounds with 6 weeks of focus
  • AWA 4.0 is good enough — spend less time here, more on Verbal
  • GRE score valid 5 years — take early in 3rd/4th year
Target Score
680+
Focus (out of 805)
Prep Time
3–6 mo
Intensive study needed
Exam Fee
~USD 250
≈ ৳27,500
Score Validity
5 Years
From exam date
Required For
MBA
Top business schools globally
Month 1–2 · Foundation

📊 GMAT Focus Edition

  • GMAT now uses "Focus Edition" — 3 sections: Quant, Verbal, Data Insights
  • Official GMAT Free Starter Kit — 2 full practice tests (free)
  • Quant: Problem Solving + Data Sufficiency — Bangladesh math background helps
  • Verbal: Critical Reasoning is most important (new format)
  • Data Insights: Replaces Integrated Reasoning — analyze charts, multi-source data
Month 3–4 · Intensive

📚 Strategic Practice

  • GMAT Club (free) — 5000+ practice questions with explanations
  • TTP (Target Test Prep) — best Quant course (USD 99/month)
  • Manhattan GMAT books — buy at Nilkhet or PDF online
  • Critical Reasoning: Read LSAT Logical Reasoning explanations (free, same skill)
  • 1 full timed mock test per week minimum
Month 5–6 · Final

🎯 Mock Tests + Exam

  • Official GMAT Practice Exams 3–6 (paid, USD 35 each)
  • Score predictor: GMAT Club free estimator tool
  • Register at mba.com — Prometric centers in Dhaka
  • Top MBA programs: HBS (730+), Wharton (730+), IIM Calcutta (700+)

🆓 Free Resources

Official Free
GMAT Official Starter Kit
2 full practice tests + 90 questions free from the exam makers. Always start here.
FREEVisit ↗
Question Bank
GMAT Club
5000+ free practice questions, error log tool, verbal & quant forums with expert explanations.
FREEVisit ↗
YouTube
Ace the GMAT
Free Critical Reasoning and Verbal lessons. Good for understanding question types.
FREE
Best Paid
Target Test Prep (TTP)
Industry-leading Quant course. USD 99/month. Worth every taka for serious MBA aspirants.
USD 99/moVisit ↗

💡 GMAT Tips for BD MBA Aspirants

  • IBA Dhaka MBA requires GMAT 550+ — achievable with 2–3 months prep
  • Top US/EU MBA (HBS, Wharton, INSEAD): 720–740+ required — plan 6 months
  • GRE accepted by most MBA programs now — compare which suits you better first
  • GMAT Focus Edition is shorter and more adaptive — different from old GMAT
  • Work experience matters more than score for MBA — both must be strong
Target Score
1450+
Out of 1600 (Digital SAT)
Prep Time
3–6 mo
From HSC background
Exam Fee
~USD 60
≈ ৳6,600 (international)
Score Validity
No Expiry
Scores don't expire
Required For
Undergrad USA
Bachelors at US universities
Month 1–2 · Foundation

📖 Digital SAT Format

  • SAT is now Digital (Adaptive) — 2 sections: Reading & Writing + Math
  • Khan Academy SAT Prep (free, official partnership with CollegeBoard)
  • Math: BD HSC math = great foundation for SAT Math (800 possible!)
  • Reading & Writing: Focus on evidence-based questions, grammar rules
  • Bluebook app (free official SAT practice platform) — download immediately
Month 3–4 · Practice

📚 Section-by-Section

  • Khan Academy: 800+ free practice questions tailored to weak areas
  • Math 800: Algebra, Advanced Math, Problem Solving & Data Analysis
  • Reading/Writing: Main idea, command of evidence, transitions, grammar
  • Full practice test every 2 weeks in Bluebook — adaptive simulation
  • CollegeBoard official practice tests 1–8 (free PDF download)
Month 5–6 · Final

🎯 Mock + Register

  • 4+ full timed Bluebook practice tests in final 6 weeks
  • SAT score goal by university: MIT 1540+, State schools 1200+
  • Register: CollegeBoard.org — international test centers include Dhaka (AISD, etc.)
  • HSC students: Start SAT prep in Class 11 — take by Class 12

🆓 Free Resources

Best Free (Official)
Khan Academy SAT Prep
Official CollegeBoard partner. Personalized practice, 800+ questions, video lessons. 100% free.
FREEVisit ↗
Official App
Bluebook (CollegeBoard)
Free official Digital SAT practice app. Adaptive tests, exact exam interface. Must use.
FREEVisit ↗
YouTube
PrepScholar SAT
Strategy lessons for Reading & Writing. Grammar rules, evidence questions breakdown.
FREEWatch ↗
Practice Tests
CollegeBoard Official PDFs
8 full official practice tests (old paper SAT format) — free PDF download on their site.
FREEVisit ↗
Paid (Optional)
Princeton Review SAT
Best paid comprehensive SAT prep with adaptive full-length tests and tutoring options.
USD 40–200Visit ↗
Math Focus
Khan Academy Math
All SAT Math topics — Algebra through Advanced Math. Free video lessons + practice.
FREEVisit ↗

💡 SAT Tips for BD HSC Students

  • Math section is your biggest advantage — HSC math is harder than SAT Math. Practice 800!
  • Digital SAT is adaptive — first module sets difficulty for second. Do well in module 1
  • Reading & Writing: Grammar rules are simple but must be learned systematically
  • No penalty for wrong answers — always guess, never leave blank
  • Apply to US undergrad with strong SAT + strong extracurriculars + GPA — all matter equally
📋 In-and-Out Checklist
Country-wise complete document guide
Country-wise complete document guide

Country-Specific Complete Checklist

Passport থেকে flight পর্যন্ত — কোনো কিছু miss করবে না।

📄 Documents Required

  • Valid Passport (min 6 months validity — renew at Agargaon PO)
  • NID card (National Identity Card) — original + 2 copies
  • Birth Certificate (English translation notarized)
  • All academic transcripts (official seal + translation if needed)
  • Degree certificates / provisional certificates
  • IELTS/TOEFL official score report
  • GRE official score report (if required)
  • I-20 form from US university (issued after acceptance)
  • DS-160 form (online, US student visa application)
  • Bank solvency certificate (must cover 1 year expenses)
  • Scholarship letter (if funded — reduces financial proof needed)
  • 3 passport photos (specific US visa specifications)

🏦 Bank Solvency Guide (BDT)

  • Minimum balance: Program annual cost × 1.5 (safer) in BDT
  • For unfunded MS (~USD 30K): ৳49.5 Lac minimum (at ৳110/USD)
  • For funded PhD: Show ৳10-15 Lac as "personal funds" backup
  • Bank: Must be 3+ months maintained (Bangladesh Bank regulated)
  • Solvency certificate: Get from any scheduled bank (standard format)
  • Sponsor letter: Parents/Guardian can co-sponsor (add their account too)
  • Fixed Deposit: সহজ option — open FDR 3+ months before visa date
  • Do NOT borrow for solvency — visa officers can detect lump sum deposits

🎙️ US Embassy Interview Tips (Dhaka)

  • Book appointment: ustraveldocs.com — F-1 student visa
  • Arrive 30 min early (American Embassy, Bashundhara)
  • Dress: Professional but not over-formal (clean formal casual)
  • First 60 seconds matter most — greet confidently in English
  • Key question: "Why this university?" — have specific answer about professors/research
  • Key question: "Will you return to Bangladesh?" — always answer YES with reason
  • Key question: "How will you fund your study?" — know exact scholarship details
  • Bring ALL documents but only show what's asked
  • Visa officer = NOT academic expert — explain research in simple terms
  • If rejected: H221(b) is common — reapply with stronger financial proof

⏰ Timeline Summary

  • 3rd Year: Research start, IELTS prep begin
  • 3rd Year End: IELTS exam (first attempt)
  • 4th Year Start: GRE prep, professor emails
  • 4th Year Sept-Dec: University applications submit
  • 4th Year Feb-Apr: Admission decisions arrive
  • 4th Year May: Accept offer, pay deposit
  • 4th Year Jun: I-20 received, DS-160 apply
  • 4th Year Jul: Embassy interview
  • 4th Year Aug: FLIGHT DATE 🛫

📄 Documents Required

  • Valid Passport (min 1 year validity for study permit duration)
  • Letter of Acceptance from Canadian university (official)
  • Proof of financial support (tuition + CAD 10,000 living)
  • Immigration medical exam (panel physician — Dhaka has approved clinics)
  • Police clearance certificate (Bangladesh Police)
  • Biometrics (at Canadian VAC in Dhaka — book early!)
  • Statement of purpose for study permit (different from SOP for admission)
  • Transcript + degree certificates
  • Quebec: Additional CAQ certificate required before study permit

🏦 Bank Solvency (BDT)

  • Minimum: Tuition + CAD 10,000 (৳8.2 Lac) for 1st year living
  • For UofT unfunded MS (~CAD 30K + 10K): ৳32.8 Lac total
  • For funded PhD: Show scholarship letter — living proof (CAD 10K = ৳8.2 Lac)
  • GIC (Guaranteed Investment Certificate): CAD 10,000 deposited in Canadian bank account via CIBC/ScotiaBank from Bangladesh — strongly recommended
  • SBI Dhaka offers student GIC facilitation for Canada

🎙️ Canadian Visa Tips

  • Apply online through IRCC portal — no physical embassy interview usually required!
  • Processing time: 4-12 weeks from Dhaka — apply immediately after acceptance
  • Strong ties to Bangladesh: family, property, job offer post-study
  • Study permit purpose statement: be specific about program, career plan
  • Medical exam: Book early — approved physicians in Dhaka (check IRCC website)
  • Biometrics wait: Can be 2-3 weeks in Dhaka VAC — book with application
  • SDS (Student Direct Stream): Faster processing for pre-paid GIC + IELTS 6.0+

💼 Part-Time Work (Canada)

  • On-campus: 20 hours/week during semester (no permit needed)
  • Off-campus: 20 hrs/week (study permit allows automatically since 2023 update)
  • Common jobs: Tim Hortons, campus food services, library assistant, tutoring
  • Tech jobs: Many BD students get internships at Canadian tech companies
  • Avg wage: CAD 15.50/hr (Ontario minimum) = ৳1,271/hr
  • Full semester: 20hrs × 16 weeks = CAD 4,960 ≈ ৳4 Lac per semester

📄 Documents (Germany)

  • Valid Passport (min 6 months beyond intended stay)
  • University admission letter (Zulassungsbescheid)
  • Proof of blocked account: EUR 11,904/year (৳14.3 Lac) — mandatory!
  • Health insurance proof (German statutory or private)
  • Recognized academic credentials (APS certificate for Bangladesh — mandatory!)
  • APS Certificate: Apply 3+ months before visa. German Academic Scholarship office Dhaka.
  • Language certificates (IELTS for English programs, TestDaF/DSH for German)
  • Motivation letter (Motivationsschreiben) in German or English
  • CV (European format — Europass)

🏦 Blocked Account — What Is It?

  • Germany requires EUR 11,904/year blocked in German bank account
  • In BDT: approximately ৳14.3 Lac (at EUR 1 = ৳120)
  • Process: Fintiba or Expatrio (online service, takes 2-3 weeks from BD)
  • Released: EUR 992/month to you in Germany — covers rent + food easily!
  • After arrival you withdraw monthly — this IS your living money
  • Fintiba: fintiba.com — BD-friendly, accepts international wire transfer
  • Your actual tuition = EUR 144-300/semester ONLY (basically free education!)

🎙️ German Embassy Tips (Dhaka)

  • German Embassy: Gulshan 2, Dhaka (visa section)
  • Book via VFS Global — extremely busy, book 6-8 weeks ahead
  • APS certificate MUST be obtained first before visa appointment
  • Interview mostly document verification — less intimidating than US
  • Speak simply, honestly about study plans
  • Show knowledge of German education system — impresses consular officers
  • Processing: 4-8 weeks typically
  • Student can work 120 full days or 240 half days per year legally

💼 APS Certificate — Critical!

  • APS = Akademische Prüfstelle — mandatory for Bangladeshi students to Germany
  • German Academic Evaluation Center verifies your certificates
  • Cost: ~EUR 150 (approx ৳18,000)
  • Timeline: Apply 3-4 months before your intended visa date
  • Apply through German Embassy Dhaka education section
  • Bring: All transcripts, mark sheets, degree certificates (originals + copies)
  • Interview in Dhaka: Brief academic interview to verify credentials

📄 Documents (UK)

  • Valid Passport
  • CAS (Confirmation of Acceptance for Studies) from UK university
  • Proof of English: IELTS 6.5+ (UKVI IELTS — specific test type!)
  • IELTS for UKVI ≠ Academic IELTS. Book the correct one at British Council Dhaka!
  • Financial proof: GBP 1,334/month for London or GBP 1,023/month outside London
  • Tuberculosis test (Bangladesh is in TB testing required list)
  • Academic credentials
  • Immigration Health Surcharge (IHS): GBP 776/year — pay online

🏦 Bank Solvency (UK) — BDT

  • For London: GBP 1,334 × 9 months = GBP 12,006 = ৳16.8 Lac minimum
  • For outside London: GBP 1,023 × 9 = GBP 9,207 = ৳12.9 Lac
  • PLUS tuition fees proof
  • Funds must be held for 28 consecutive days before visa application!
  • Scholarship letter can replace financial proof if fully funded
  • For partial scholarship: Show scholarship + remaining personal funds
  • NHS: Free healthcare access once IHS paid — huge advantage!

🎙️ UK Visa Tips (Student Visa)

  • Apply online: gov.uk/student-visa — straightforward process
  • No interview required for standard student visa from Bangladesh
  • UKVI IELTS: Different test centre — do not confuse with regular IELTS
  • TB test: Mandated — go to designated clinic (list on UKVI website)
  • Decision time: 3 weeks standard, 5 business days priority (extra cost)
  • Post-study: 2-year Graduate Route visa after any degree (huge opportunity!)
  • Graduate Route = 2 years work anywhere in UK after graduation

💼 Part-Time Work (UK)

  • Allowed: 20 hours/week during term time
  • Full-time during vacations (Christmas, Easter, summer)
  • Minimum wage: GBP 11.44/hour (2024) = ৳1,601/hour
  • Monthly earnings (20hrs): ≈ GBP 992 = ৳1.39 Lac/month
  • Common jobs: Retail, hospitality, campus jobs, Bengali restaurant Brick Lane!
  • NHS: Bangladeshi students with IHS get free GP/hospital access
  • National Insurance number needed — apply HMRC after arrival

💰 Bank Solvency Quick Reference — All Countries in BDT (at approx 2025 rates)

Country Program Annual Cost (Foreign Currency) BDT Equivalent Recommended Solvency
🇺🇸 USA Unfunded MS USD 40,000-60,000 ৳44-66 Lac ৳60-90 Lac (1.5×)
🇺🇸 USA Funded PhD USD 3,000-5,000 (net after stipend) ৳3.3-5.5 Lac ৳10-15 Lac (personal)
🇨🇦 Canada Unfunded MS CAD 30,000-40,000 ৳24.6-32.8 Lac ৳35-45 Lac (1.5×)
🇩🇪 Germany Any Masters EUR 11,904 (blocked) + EUR 300 tuition ৳14.3 Lac + ৳36K ৳15 Lac (blocked account)
🇬🇧 UK Masters (1yr) GBP 22,000-30,000 + GBP 12,000 living ৳47.6-58.8 Lac ৳50-70 Lac
📅 365-Day Action Plan

3rd Year University থেকে Flight Date — Complete Roadmap

এই calendar follow করলে এবং consistently execute করলে — তুমি flight-এ উঠবে। No shortcuts, but every step is clear।

3RD YEAR
SEM 5-6
🌱 FOUNDATION PHASE
Months 1-12 | Build your research + language base
  • গণনা শুরু করো: তুমি কোন দেশে যেতে চাও? USA vs Canada vs Germany vs UK — decision নাও এখনই
  • IELTS preparation শুরু করো — Cambridge books কেনো, daily 1 hour পড়ো
  • বর্তমান CGPA calculate করো (4.0 scale-এ convert করো)
  • Supervisor-এর সাথে কথা বলো — thesis topic finalize করো (research-worthy হতে হবে)
  • ResearchGate account খোলো — Google Scholar profile create করো
  • GitHub: Clean up repos। Minimum 5 meaningful projects public করো
  • LinkedIn profile: Academic + research focused, professional photo
  • Target 5-6 professors-এর research paper পড়া শুরু করো (তোমার field-এ)
  • BUET/DU জানলে — department-এর কোন professor internationally connected? Note করো
  • Semester 6 শেষে: IELTS first attempt। Target 6.5+ (7.0 হলে excellent)
4TH YEAR
JULY-SEPT
🔬 RESEARCH & GRE PHASE
Months 13-15 | Research output + Test scores
  • Thesis/research project: Submit to local conference (ICCIT/ICECE) — early paper credit
  • GRE preparation শুরু করো (if targeting USA/Canada) — Magoosh + ETS prep
  • Germany targeting? APS certificate process শুরু করো — 3 months লাগে
  • University shortlist তৈরি করো: 5 safety, 6 target, 3 reach — total 14-15টা
  • Each target university-র department visit করো (website) — interested professors note করো
  • Cold email শুরু করো — প্রথম batch: 10 professors। Track করো Google Sheets-এ
  • SOP first draft লেখো। CGPA reframe করো honestly কিন্তু positively
  • LOR request করো — minimum 3 professors/supervisors কে। "LOR package" দাও তাদের
  • Passport চেক করো — expiry date। প্রয়োজনে renew করো (Agargaon Passport Office)
  • Bank account planning — parents-কে জানাও সolvency-র কথা
OCT-DEC
4TH YEAR
📝 APPLICATION SEASON
Months 16-18 | The most critical phase
  • GRE exam দাও — October (scores arrive within 15 days)
  • IELTS second attempt (if needed) — British Council Dhaka
  • Applications open করো — October 1 থেকে: Common App, Slate portals, individual university portals
  • SOP: Final version। Peer review করাও — preferably abroad-পড়া senior
  • LOR: Confirm সব recommenders। Deadline reminder পাঠাও politely
  • Transcript request করো from registrar — official sealed copies (10+ copies নাও)
  • WES evaluation: Canada-র জন্য credential evaluation করাও (৳8,000 approx)
  • December 1: Early decision deadlines শুরু। Apply করো first batch।
  • December 15: Most US PhD deadlines। Final submission করো
  • Professor follow-up email করো যারা respond করেছিলো — "I've submitted my application"
JAN-MARCH
4TH YEAR
⏳ WAITING & SCHOLARSHIP PHASE
Months 19-21 | Stay productive, don't panic
  • UK deadlines: January (most). Germany: Rolling (apply ASAP)
  • Canada: January-February deadline majority
  • DAAD application (Germany): October-November deadline — submit early!
  • Commonwealth Scholarship: December 15 deadline — already passed? Next cycle plan করো
  • Erasmus Mundus: January-February deadline। Apply করো if field matches
  • Interview invitations: January-February. Prepare for Skype/Zoom professor interviews
  • Professor interview prep: Research-এর details practice করো। "Tell me about your research" — 2-min pitch prepare করো
  • Final semester exams — এখনো GPA improve করার chance! Last 2 semesters matter
  • Start financial planning with family — visa solvency discussion
APRIL-MAY
FINAL YEAR
🎉 DECISION & ACCEPTANCE PHASE
Months 22-23 | Decisions start arriving!
  • Admission decisions arrive: February-April (US), March-May (Canada/UK/Germany)
  • Compare offers: Funding package, stipend, research fit, location, PR pathway — spreadsheet তৈরি করো
  • April 15: US universal offer deadline (accept or decline by this date)
  • Counter-offer করো: More funding? Email graduate coordinator — "I have a competing offer from X"
  • Visa preparation শুরু: Bank solvency target finalize করো
  • I-20 / CAS / Zulassung letter collect করো from accepted university
  • University Hall/housing application করো immediately (waitlists দ্রুত ভরে)
  • Graduation ceremony — family সাথে celebrate করো! তুমি deserve করেছো 🎓
JUNE-JULY
POST-GRAD
🛂 VISA & PRE-DEPARTURE PHASE
Months 24-25 | Final countdown
  • DS-160 / Study Permit / Student Visa apply করো IMMEDIATELY after I-20/CAS/Zulassung পাওয়ার পর
  • Embassy appointment book করো (Dhaka US Embassy, Canadian VAC, German VFS, UK VAC)
  • Bank solvency certificate তৈরি করো — 28 days minimum balance maintain করো (UK-এর জন্য)
  • Medical exam: TB test (UK), Medical exam (Canada if needed)
  • APS certificate (Germany): Must be done by now — if not, এটাই bottleneck
  • Embassy interview / Visa submission — prepare করো thoroughly
  • VISA APPROVED 🎉 — Stamp passport immediately photograph করো (backup)
  • Flight booking: Book 6-8 weeks ahead। Biman/Emirates/Qatar দেখো (BD discount options)
  • Accommodation: University housing confirmed? If not, এখনই look করো Kijiji/SpareRoom/Studenten WG
  • Bangladesh Bank approval: Wire transfer permit নাও (for blocked account/tuition wire)
AUGUST
DEPARTURE
✈️ FLIGHT DATE — তুমি পৌঁছে গেছো!
Month 26 | The beginning of your new chapter
  • Pre-departure checklist: All original documents in carry-on (NOT checked luggage!)
  • Photocopy/scan: All documents emailed to yourself + parents
  • Cash: USD/GBP/EUR/CAD 500 minimum in hand for first week
  • International SIM or airport WiFi plan finalized
  • Housing address confirmed — know exactly where to go from airport
  • Contact: BD student association of your university (they'll pick you up!)
  • Family farewell। তাদের proud করবে — তুমি already করে ফেলেছো।
  • LAND. EXPLORE. SUCCEED. তোমার স্বপ্ন যাত্রা শুরু হলো। 🌏🇧🇩
💼 Part-Time Job Prospects

বিদেশে পড়তে পড়তে টাকাও আয় করো

🇺🇸 USA
USD 15-25/hr
≈ ৳1,650-2,750/hr | 20hrs/week on campus
  • Research Assistant (RA) — most common for BD students
  • Teaching Assistant (TA) — covers tuition + stipend
  • Campus jobs: Library, dining, IT support
  • Tutoring: Math/CS — USD 20-40/hr
  • Grader: USD 15-18/hr
  • OPT (after grad): 12 months, STEM 36 months
📌 F-1 Visa: 20hrs/week on-campus | CPT/OPT for off-campus
🇨🇦 Canada
CAD 15.50-22/hr
≈ ৳1,271-1,804/hr | 20hrs/week allowed
  • Graduate Assistantship (RA/TA) — most common
  • Tim Hortons, Subway, Loblaws retail
  • Campus library/admin jobs
  • Tech internship (Waterloo co-op CAD 25-45/hr)
  • Bengali restaurant (major cities)
  • Post-grad: PGWP — 1-3 year open work permit
📌 Study permit: 20hrs/week off-campus + unlimited on-campus
🇩🇪 Germany
EUR 12-18/hr
≈ ৳1,440-2,160/hr | 120 full days/year
  • Werkstudent (student employee): 20hrs/week
  • University research assistant (HiWi)
  • Supermarket jobs (REWE, Lidl, ALDI)
  • Food delivery (Wolt/Lieferando)
  • IT/engineering werkstudent at BMW/Siemens
  • Post-grad: 18-month job seeker visa!
📌 120 full days OR 240 half days per year. German B1 = more jobs
🇬🇧 UK
GBP 11.44-16/hr
≈ ৳1,601-2,240/hr | 20hrs/week
  • Retail: Tesco, Sainsbury's, Boots
  • Campus jobs: SU bar, library, printing
  • Bengali restaurants (Brick Lane, Bradford, Birmingham)
  • NHS healthcare assistant (if relevant degree)
  • Graduate Route: 2 years post-graduation work
  • Tutoring: GBP 15-30/hr (Maths, Science)
📌 20hrs/week term time | Full-time vacations | NHS IHS = free healthcare
🎙️ Embassy Masterclass

Visa Interview — Do's & Don'ts for BD Students

🇺🇸 US Student Visa (F-1) Interview — Dhaka

✅ করবে

  • English-এ clearly বলো — confident tone
  • "I plan to return to Bangladesh" — always say this
  • Know your university name, professor, research topic
  • Know scholarship amount exact figure
  • Bring I-20, acceptance letter, IELTS, financial proof
  • Eye contact রাখো with visa officer
  • Short, direct answers দাও
  • Smile করো — not nervous!

❌ করবে না

  • "I want to stay in USA" — কখনো বলবে না
  • Nervous হয়ে বাংলাতে switch করো না
  • Unnecessary documents show করো না
  • Lie করো না — officers are trained to detect
  • Financial instability show করো না
  • Immigration intent hint দিও না
  • Phone রাখো silent — দেখবে না কখনো

🇩🇪 German Student Visa — VFS Global Dhaka

✅ করবে

  • APS certificate সবার আগে নাও
  • Blocked account proof রেডি রাখো
  • German univ admission letter official সিল সহ
  • Health insurance proof (TK/AOK pre-enrollment)
  • Return intention: Family, property, job plan
  • German education system সম্পর্কে জানো
  • Documents: Organized, tabbed, in order

❌ করবে না

  • APS ছাড়া apply করো না
  • Blocked account rush করো না — process 2-3 weeks
  • Generic answers দিও না
  • Travel history miss করো না (if have)
  • Health insurance delay করো না

🇨🇦 Canada Study Permit — Online Application

✅ করবে

  • SDS route নাও (Student Direct Stream) — faster!
  • GIC: CAD 10,000 Fintiba/Scotiabank-এ করো
  • Purpose statement: Study plan + return intent
  • Police clearance: Bangladesh Police HQ, DMP
  • Biometrics: VAC Dhaka-তে early book করো
  • Medical exam: Approved panel physician in Dhaka
  • IRCC portal: Track application regularly

❌ করবে না

  • Late apply করো না — processing 4-12 weeks
  • Purpose statement copy-paste করো না
  • Incomplete documents submit করো না
  • GIC-র আগে apply করো না
  • Old/expired photos use করো না

🇬🇧 UK Student Visa — Gov.uk Portal

✅ করবে

  • UKVI IELTS নাও — regular IELTS accepted নাও by UKBA!
  • CAS number পাওয়ার পরই apply করো
  • 28-day bank statement (maintain balance)
  • TB test at approved clinic Dhaka
  • IHS (Immigration Health Surcharge) online পে করো
  • Priority service consider করো (faster)
  • Biometrics VAC UK Dhaka-তে করো

❌ করবে না

  • Regular IELTS with UKVI marker miss করো না
  • 28-day rule miss করো না (bank balance)
  • TB test forget করো না (mandatory for BD)
  • CAS ছাড়া apply করো না
  • Incorrect personal info enter করো না
✍️ Our Philosophy
"তোমার CGPA তোমার Destiny না।"
— PiLOT Study Abroad Platform

PiLOT-এর কথা

আমরা জানি। তুমি রাত ৩টায় জেগে QS ranking দেখছো। Stanford, UofT, TU Munich-এর website scroll করছো। তারপর নিজের CGPA দেখছো — আর মনে হচ্ছে, "আমার দ্বারা হবে না।"

"কিন্তু আমরা এমন Bangladeshi students চিনি যারা CGPA 2.8 নিয়ে MIT-তে PhD করছে। কারণ তাদের ছিল একটা IEEE paper আর একজন professor যে তাদের believe করেছিলেন।"

PiLOT শুধু একটা study abroad guide না। এটা Bangladesh-এর প্রতিটা ambitious student-এর জন্য — যে জানে সে capable, কিন্তু জানে না কোথা থেকে শুরু করবে।

আমরা তোমাকে দেখাবো: কিভাবে low CGPA-কে research narrative-এ convert করতে হয়। কিভাবে professor-কে cold email করলে তারা actually reply করে। কিভাবে Germany-র tuition-free university-তে বাবা-মার টাকা ছাড়াই পড়া যায়। কিভাবে Canada-র Graduate RA হলে তুমি monthly stipend পাবে — student loan না।

তোমার স্বপ্নটা real। আমাদের কাজ সেটাকে একটা concrete, step-by-step plan-এ convert করা। বাকিটা তোমার।

চলো শুরু করি — স্বপ্ন যাত্রা শুরু হোক আজ থেকেই। 🇧🇩🌏

✍️ AI Tools

SOP / Personal Statement Reviewer

তোমার Statement of Purpose paste করো — AI তোমাকে structure, tone, CGPA explanation এবং line-by-line feedback দেবে।

📄
তোমার SOP paste করো
AI তোমার draft analyze করে detailed feedback দেবে
📧 Professor Outreach

Cold Email Generator

Professor-এর name, university, আর recent paper দাও — AI তোমার জন্য tailored 150-word cold email তৈরি করবে যেটা reply পাবে।

তোমার Profile
Professor Details

🎓 Real Stories

Alumni Success Stories

Real Bangladeshi students — তাদের CGPA, path, আর outcome। তোমার story হবে কোনটা?

👨‍💻
Anonymous · BUET CSE
Graduated 2021
CGPA: 2.95 / 4.0 (Struggled in 2nd year)
Published 1 conference paper (ICCIT 2021) + cold-emailed 42 professors. Got 3 responses, 1 offer.
✅ Outcome
University of Toronto — MS CS
RA Funding · Now at Amazon Canada
👩‍🔬
Anonymous · RUET EEE
Graduated 2020
CGPA: 3.4 / 4.0 · IELTS 7.0
Applied DAAD scholarship in 3rd attempt. Took German A1 course + targeted TU Munich specifically. No GRE needed.
✅ Outcome
TU Munich — MS EEE
DAAD Full Scholarship · PhD now at KIT
👨‍🎓
Anonymous · DU Physics
Graduated 2022
CGPA: 3.1 · No publications initially
Applied Commonwealth Scholarship. Got rejected once, re-applied with stronger personal statement focused on Bangladesh development impact.
✅ Outcome
University of Manchester — MSc
Commonwealth Scholarship (Full) · Now at UNDP
👩‍💻
Anonymous · CUET CSE
Graduated 2021
CGPA: 2.8 · Failed visa once (USA)
USA F-1 rejected once due to weak financial ties. Switched strategy to Canada Atlantic Program. Got GIC, strong study plan.
✅ Outcome
Dalhousie University — MS CS
Atlantic PR in 14 months · Now Canadian PR
👨‍🏭
Anonymous · BUET ME
Graduated 2019
CGPA: 3.6 · GRE 322 · IELTS 7.5
Applied to 12 PhD programs. Focused SOP on specific professor's renewable energy research. Got 4 offers with funding.
✅ Outcome
Georgia Tech — PhD ME
Full RA Funding · Published 3 journals · STEM OPT

Scholarship Deadline Reminder

Scholarships select করো এবং email দাও — আমরা তোমাকে 60, 30 আর 7 দিন আগে remind করবো।

📬 Email Reminder Setup
✅ 60 days before deadline
✅ 30 days before deadline
✅ 7 days before deadline — final reminder
🗺️ Visual Comparison

Interactive Cost Comparison

Country select করো এবং tuition, living cost এবং BD student presence একসাথে compare করো।

📄 Export

Download Your Personalized Plan

Profile Matcher result, matched universities, scholarship deadlines এবং action steps — সব একটা PDF-এ।

🏦 Financial Prep

Bangladesh Bank Solvency Guide

কোন bank, কোন branch, কত দিন লাগে, কী কী documents লাগে — city-by-city practical guide যেটা কোথাও নেই।

⚠️ Critical Rules — Visa Officers জানেন

❌ যা করবে না
  • Lump sum deposit (one day-এ বড় amount) — detect হয়
  • Visa apply করার ঠিক আগে account open করা
  • অন্যের account থেকে transfer করে show করা
  • Statement-এ শুধু একটা source দেখানো
✅ Best Practices
  • 3+ months আগে FDR open করো, gradually build করো
  • Regular monthly income/salary statement attach করো
  • Parents' income certificate + NID সাথে রাখো
  • 2× first year cost maintain করো minimum
